mapper.sql: select reviewer_id, user_id, real_name, gender, birthday, affiliation, department, title, academic_degree, research_direction, expertise_fields, email, phone, mobile, address, zip_code, id_card, work_no, review_count, accept_rate, avg_review_days, review_score_avg, status, is_deleted, delete_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from editor_reviewer
mapper.select:
AND real_name like concat('%', #{realName}, '%') AND email like concat('%', #{email}, '%') AND affiliation like concat('%', #{affiliation}, '%') AND expertise_fields like concat('%', #{expertiseFields}, '%') AND status = #{status} AND is_deleted = #{isDeleted}
order by review_count desc, create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into editor_reviewer ( user_id, real_name, gender, birthday, affiliation, department, title, academic_degree, research_direction, expertise_fields, email, phone, mobile, address, zip_code, id_card, work_no, review_count, accept_rate, avg_review_days, review_score_avg, status, is_deleted, delete_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{userId}, #{realName}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{affiliation}, #{department}, #{title}, #{academicDegree}, #{researchDirection}, #{expertiseFields}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{mobile}, #{address}, #{zipCode}, #{idCard}, #{workNo}, #{reviewCount}, #{acceptRate}, #{avgReviewDays}, #{reviewScoreAvg}, #{status}, #{isDeleted}, #{deleteTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update editor_reviewer set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}
mapper.delete: update editor_reviewer set is_deleted = '2', delete_time = sysdate() where reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}

update editor_reviewer set is_deleted = '2', delete_time = sysdate() where reviewer_id in
#{reviewerId}
